# Reports Directory

Generated reports and explainability outputs.

## Files (auto-generated)

| File | Description |
|---|---|
| `model_summary.csv` | All models with OOF RMSE, MAE, weight, timestamp |
| `shap_summary.png` | Global SHAP feature importance |
| `error_analysis.png` | Residual plots, worst predictions |
| `polychain_ablation.md` | PolyChain ablation study results |
